active_goal: Improve MemoryOS Lite v3 into a benchmark-usable Letta-style agent memory system for LongMemEval and LoCoMo, without demo-only phase completion, without hiding case-level regressions, and without enabling the v3 kernel by default.
failing_tests_added_before_fix: Registry/selection RED: missing explicit registry and fail-closed unopened tool behavior.
Archive attach RED: missing service-backed archive attachment execution, verification, and v3 visibility.
Core promotion RED: missing durable pending promotion candidate APIs and verification.
Policy integration RED: service-level opt-in kernel policy only required approval for archive_write.
Review repair RED: malformed approved replay for registered tools raised out of MemoryOSService opt-in kernel execution.

verification_commands.command: uv run pytest tests/test_memory_lifecycle.py tests/test_core_memory_service.py tests/test_archival_store.py tests/test_context_composer.py -q

MEMORYOS_MEMORY_ARCH=v3 uv run memoryos eval public --benchmark locomo --data-path benchmarks/locomo/locomo10.json --baseline memoryos_lite --limit 5 --no-llm-answer --no-llm-judge --run-id phase16_locomo5_kernel_default_off_repair
verification_commands.result: 5 rows; 5 fail / 0 pass projected no-LLM structural smoke; kernel trace lengths [0, 0, 0, 0, 0]

verification_commands.command: MEMORYOS_MEMORY_ARCH=v3 MEMORYOS_AGENT_KERNEL=v1 uv run memoryos eval public --benchmark locomo --data-path benchmarks/locomo/locomo10.json --baseline memoryos_lite --limit 5 --no-llm-answer --no-llm-judge --run-id phase16_locomo5_kernel_tools_structural_repair
